news.title:
Coal India shares rise 5% as higher oil prices boost coal buying.
Increased long-haul freight contributes to Coal India's stock surge.
news.summary:
Coal India shares rise 5% as higher oil prices boost coal buying.
Increased long-haul freight contributes to Coal India's stock surge.

news.title:
Axis Capital questions Coal India's ability to boost demand as power needs decline.
Concerns raised over Coal India's capability amid falling power requirements in India.
news.summary:
Axis Capital questions Coal India's ability to boost demand as power needs decline.
Concerns raised over Coal India's capability amid falling power requirements in India.

news.title:
Coal India predicts global coal price rise due to geopolitics; FY27 volumes to grow by 10M tons.
Subsidiary listings planned: CMPDI by March 2026, MCL & SECL by end-2026; wage revision set for July 2026.
news.summary:
Coal India predicts global coal price rise due to geopolitics; FY27 volumes to grow by 10M tons.
Subsidiary listings planned: CMPDI by March 2026, MCL & SECL by end-2026; wage revision set for July 2026.

news.title: Coal India plans ₹50,000 crore capex over 3 years to boost production.
news.summary: Coal India plans ₹50,000 crore capex over 3 years to boost production.

news.title:
Coal India targets 5% volume growth; power demand low this year.
Annual capex set at Rs 17,000 crore over 4 years; premiums stable at 50.
news.summary:
Coal India targets 5% volume growth; power demand low this year.
Annual capex set at Rs 17,000 crore over 4 years; premiums stable at 50.

news.title:
Sensex and Nifty opened higher amid diplomacy hopes; Sensex at 79,501.32 (+0.49%), Nifty at 24,607.95 (+0.52%) by 9:45 am.
Coal India (+2.83%), ONGC (+2.67%), Reliance (+2.33%) led gains; Max Healthcare (-1.32%), HCL Tech (-0.98%) faced declines.
news.summary:
Sensex and Nifty opened higher amid diplomacy hopes; Sensex at 79,501.32 (+0.49%), Nifty at 24,607.95 (+0.52%) by 9:45 am.
Coal India (+2.83%), ONGC (+2.67%), Reliance (+2.33%) led gains; Max Healthcare (-1.32%), HCL Tech (-0.98%) faced declines.

news.title: Citi revises Coal India target price to Rs 430, up from Rs 415.
news.summary: Citi revises Coal India target price to Rs 430, up from Rs 415.

news.title: Citi puts Coal India under a 90-day upside catalyst watch.
news.summary: Citi puts Coal India under a 90-day upside catalyst watch.

news.title:
Axis Capital upgrades Coal India to ADD citing higher global coal prices and better volume outlook.
FY27-28 PAT estimates raised 8-11%; target price increased to ₹480, with potential rise to ₹540 if e-auction premium hits 100%.
news.summary:
Axis Capital upgrades Coal India to ADD citing higher global coal prices and better volume outlook.
FY27-28 PAT estimates raised 8-11%; target price increased to ₹480, with potential rise to ₹540 if e-auction premium hits 100%.

news.title:
Coal India shares gain 2% in weak market, supported by pricing optimism and 8x FY27 earnings valuation.
Feb e-auction premiums at 35% over notified price; rebound in power demand boosts investor sentiment.
news.summary:

news.title: Coal India's February e-auction quantity rose by 50%, with prices 35% above the notified rate.
news.summary: Coal India's February e-auction quantity rose by 50%, with prices 35% above the notified rate.

news.title:
Coal India shared provisional e-auction data for Feb 2026, covering CIL & 8 subsidiaries.
Data includes quantities in lakh tonnes and percentage increase over notified prices.
news.summary:

news.title:
Coal India plans Rs 16,000 crore capex for FY26, focusing on evacuation infrastructure, machinery, and land procurement.
CIL aims for cleaner coal tech, solar projects, and critical mineral exploration while expanding washery capacity to 44 MTPA by FY30.
news.summary:
Coal India plans Rs 16,000 crore capex for FY26, focusing on evacuation infrastructure, machinery, and land procurement.
CIL aims for cleaner coal tech, solar projects, and critical mineral exploration while expanding washery capacity to 44 MTPA by FY30.

news.title:
Coal India reported provisional production of 74.7MT in Feb'26, up 0.7% YoY.
Offtake stood at 62MT in Feb'26, showing a 1.5% decline compared to last year.
news.summary:
Coal India reported provisional production of 74.7MT in Feb'26, up 0.7% YoY.

news.title:
Coal India assures readiness for summer with 175.5 MT coal stock, aiming to reduce imports amid rising global prices.
Shares rise 2%, trading at ₹434.3; stock up 18.9% in 12 months, supported by record coal stocks and operational assurance.
news.summary:
Coal India assures readiness for summer with 175.5 MT coal stock, aiming to reduce imports amid rising global prices.
Shares rise 2%, trading at ₹434.3; stock up 18.9% in 12 months, supported by record coal stocks and operational assurance.

news.title:
India plans to reduce thermal coal imports for power plants by 30% by 2026.
Officials suggest increased blending with domestic coal to meet the target.
news.summary:
India plans to reduce thermal coal imports for power plants by 30% by 2026.

news.title: Coal India assures sufficient coal supply to meet summer power demand.

news.title:
Coal India reports robust inventory of 115 MT as of Feb 26, 2026.
Power plants hold 55 MT stock; 60.2 MT coal ready for extraction.
